title: BI Australia Pty Ltd — Public safety
investigation_objective: BI Australia Pty Ltd was convicted by the District Court of NSW and fined $400,000 after a SafeWork NSW investigation into a workplace incident on 11 February 2022 at Kingsgrove, in which a casual forklift operator was struck and injured by a moving forklift while walking through an onsite car park being used as a makeshift storage area. The court found the company failed to ensure a proper risk assessment was in place before allowing workers on site.
scope: Convicted by the District Court of NSW for a Work Health and Safety Act breach; Court found the company's failure to conduct a proper risk assessment was inconsistent with a proactive or systematic approach to safety; Incident resulted in a worker being struck and injured by a forklift
